name: Holy Word
entries: You whisper a divine word under your breath, careful not to speak loudly, for such celestial power isn't for the unworthy. Make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d8} Radiant damage. If the target is Fey, Fiend, or Undead, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet and it can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the end of its next turn.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Cantrip Upgrade
entries: The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} when you reach levels 5 ({@dice 2d8}), 11 ({@dice 3d8}), and 17 ({@dice 4d8}).
